newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The ~€1B adjusted-EBITDA 2026 guidance raise was announced April 30 (Q1 trading update) and predates June 9; the closed-loop battery recycling push is an ongoing strategic theme, not a new disclosure. Recent filings are passive-holder threshold notices.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node screen: no fresh evidence since June 9 for the AI-power/metal-circularity pathway (guidance raise was April 30; recycling push is ongoing strategy). Battery materials remain a latent, non-AI-hardware tie. Hold on the strict screen.
verdicts.bull: Closed-loop recycling and specialty metals could become relevant to backup-power/metal-circularity in an AI-power buildout; ~€1B EBITDA target.
verdicts.neutral: Quality materials franchise but only a latent, indirect AI connection; no new catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Cooling battery/EV segment and metal-price dependence; AI-supply relevance remains speculative.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Metal circularity/backup-power demand from AI-infrastructure buildout (latent).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Soft EV/battery demand and metal-price swings; tenuous AI linkage.
